meaning: Wall Street Journal (美国)<<华尔街日报>>
examples: WSJ: What are you working on now?

WSJ: What do you wish every new hire knew?
But consolidation has also helped stabilise the airline industry, reported the Wall Street Journal (WSJ).
Voluntary end-of-life counseling is something to cheer, as the WSJ goes on to affirm.
